title: Raul Stars shine in 3 - 0 victory
description: GEORGE NEWS - Raul Stars secured a 3 - 0 win...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Raul Stars secured a 3 - 0 win over Tigers in a Promotional/Development League match on Saturday afternoon, 7 September.

Wandile Ntlanti scored twice, and Lona Makwena added a third goal, earning the Stars their second victory after 23 fixtures. Both teams are currently near the bottom of the league table, with Stars in the second to last position.


> Stars dominated early, controlling the midfield and pressuring Tigers, who struggled to cope with their pace.


A penalty awarded for a foul in the box gave Ntlanti the chance to score his first goal, confidently converting from the spot to put his team ahead 1-0 at halftime.

The second half saw Stars maintain their dominance. Ntlanti doubled the lead with a well-placed shot, and despite Tigers' attempts to fight back, Raul Stars' defense held firm. In the final moments, Makwena sealed the win with a strike from outside the box, making it 3-0.

Tigers fought hard but failed to break through Stars' defense. The victory gives Raul Stars much-needed points in their campaign.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
